review.contractsLine: 这将在 {ticks} 个价格区间部署 {newPools} 个新的资金池智能合约。每个新合约您需支付合约 MBR。

review.groupsHint: 每个交易组对应钱包中的一次批准请求。
review.lpReserveHint: 在您持有该头寸期间锁定在您的账户中；完全退出时返还。
review.totalAlgo: 您自付的 ALGO 总额
review.title: 签名前请核对
review.subtitle: 查看钱包将要求您批准的确切内容。
review.poolSeedHint: 用于新池的最低余额和设置。未使用的部分将被退回。
review.promptsCount: 钱包将提示您签名 {count} 次。如果提示次数更多，请停止并仔细核对。
review.checklistTitle: 批准前请在钱包中核对
review.check1: 您支付的 ALGO 与上述金额一致——如果钱包显示更大的 ALGO 付款，请拒绝。
review.check2: 每笔资产转账金额与此处显示的存款相等。
review.check3: 转账发送至 Biatec 池合约，而非未知地址。
review.check4: 交易中没有 rekey、资产关闭（close-out）或 clawback。

addLiquidity.title: 添加流动性
addLiquidity.priceFormMessage: 我们无法获取此对的当前价格。请手动设置价格。
addLiquidity.liquidityShapeDescription: 流动性形状允许您将流动性放置在几个仓位中，并与其他流动性提供者聚合流动性。精度 {precision}。

descriptions.focused: 聚焦流动性形状采用当前价格，并将大部分流动性添加到当前仓位价格。它在周围仓位添加较少流动性，并在最小和最大价格添加最小流动性。
descriptions.spread: 分散流动性形状采用当前价格，并向当前仓位价格添加少量流动性。它在周围仓位添加较多流动性，并在最小和最大价格添加最大流动性。
descriptions.equal: 等流动性形状在从最小到最大的所有仓位添加相同流动性。
descriptions.single: 单仓位不使用仓位刻度系统，而是使用具有定义的最小和最大价格的单个流动性池。
descriptions.wall: 墙订单允许您定义单个价格，当当前价格低于此价格时，其他人可以在此价格水平买入，当当前价格高于固定价格时，其他人可以在此价格水平卖出。此订单类型允许您创建流动性墙，并且每当价格在此价格水平波动时，您都会赚钱。

addLiquidity.singlePortionHint: 0% 保持存款为空，100% 使用 {assetAmount} {assetSymbol} 和 {currencyAmount} {currencySymbol}。
addLiquidity.singlePortionUnavailable: 连接具有两个池资产的钱包并选择现有的单仓位范围以启用滑块。

errors.singleRatioTooSmall: 存款金额太小，无法匹配现有池比率。增加两个金额。

warnings.mayNeedOptIn: 您对 {asset} 的余额为零。如果您拥有此资产，则您的连接账户可能尚未选择加入。

info.singleRatioAdjusted: 存款金额已调整以匹配池比率。

success.poolCreated: 未创建池 | {count} 个新池已创建 | {count} 个新池已创建

about.title: 关于 Biatec DEX
about.intro: 基于 AVM 构建的自托管去中心化交易所。我们正在开发<clamm>集中流动性 AMM</clamm>协议，其中一个人可以在特定价格范围内设置流动性。
about.ecosystem: 我们不仅利用我们的流动性协议，而且每个市场订单都使用 DEX 聚合器在 {environment} 生态系统中执行。
about.aggregator: 目前使用的 DEX 聚合器是 <folks>Folks Router</folks>。
about.chart: 目前使用的图表库是 <vestige>Vestige 小部件</vestige>。
about.grantText: 此工作由 Algorand 基金会 xGov 资助计划支持 <xgov>xGov#80</xgov>。<source>源代码</source>。
about.disclaimer1: 虽然 Biatec DEX 交易已经在运行，但集中流动性智能合约仍在开发中，并且网页可能会发生变化。您正在使用测试版软件，并负责验证您签署的每笔交易。
about.disclaimer2: 自托管 – 我们不会在任何时候持有您的资产。您直接与智能合约交互，并负责保护您的 Algorand 账户。
about.disclaimer3: 我们使用 ARC14 授权来验证您是账户的持有者。您可以使用 ARC76 电子邮件-密码 Algorand 账户，并且每次进行交易时都会要求您提交密码。大多数 Algorand 钱包都可以签署交易。
about.disclaimer4: 最高安全性可以通过使用包含多个硬件设备的 2FA 设置的多重签名账户实现 (例如 Ledger)。
about.disclaimer5: 最低安全性，但最快的交易体验，可以通过助记词实现。
about.assetsDescription: 我们计划成为符合 MiCA 的公司，因此我们尽量限制使用骗局币、拉地毯代币、拉高出货代币或没有任何效用的代币。
about.legalInfo: 网站 dex.biatec.io 由 Scholtz & Company, jsa 运营。贸易注册 ID: 51882272; 税号: 2120828105。
about.legalGroup: Biatec DEX 是 Biatec 集团的一部分 - <biatec>www.biatec.io</biatec>。

help.title: 帮助中心
help.subtitle: Biatec DEX 每项功能的分步指南。可搜索或按类别浏览。

explore-assets.title: 浏览资产
explore-assets.summary: 浏览 Biatec DEX 池中的所有资产，含 TVL、价格和池数量。
explore-assets.intro: The Explore Assets page is the home of Biatec DEX. It aggregates every asset that appears in a liquidity pool, so you can scan total value locked, current prices and how many pools back each token before you trade or provide liquidity.
explore-assets.steps:
Open Explore from the top menu (it is also the landing page at /).
Use the search box to filter the table by asset name, symbol or asset ID.
Read the summary cards for total TVL, total pools and the number of listed assets.
Sort any column - for example by Total TVL or 24h volume - to find the most active markets.
Use the row actions to jump straight into trading, adding liquidity or removing liquidity for an asset.
explore-assets.tip: Columns like VWAP 1D/7D and Fees 1D/7D help you judge whether a market is liquid and how much fee income its pools are generating.

find-asset-by-id.title: 按 ID 查找资产
find-asset-by-id.summary: 通过精确的 Algorand 资产 ID（ASA）定位代币。
find-asset-by-id.intro: Every Algorand asset has a unique numeric ID. When a token name is ambiguous - or unavailable on the current network - you can find it precisely by its exact ASA ID.
find-asset-by-id.steps:
Open Explore Assets, Opt-in, or Create pool - all support ID search.
Type the exact numeric asset ID into the search box.
On networks where the asset index is unavailable, entering the exact ASA ID is required to add it.
Confirm the matched asset's name and symbol before continuing.
Proceed to trade, opt in, or add it to a pool.
find-asset-by-id.tip: Asset IDs are the safest way to identify a token - names and symbols can be copied by scam tokens, but the ID is unique.

connect-wallet.title: 连接钱包
connect-wallet.summary: 使用 Algorand 钱包或 ARC-76 邮箱/密码账户登录。
connect-wallet.intro: Biatec DEX is fully self-custodial - connecting a wallet only proves you control an Algorand address and lets you sign transactions. The DEX never holds your assets.
connect-wallet.steps:
Click Login in the top-right of the header.
Choose your wallet - Pera, Defly, Lute, WalletConnect and others are supported.
Alternatively use an ARC-76 email and password to derive an Algorand account in the browser.
Approve the ARC-14 authentication request so the app can verify you own the address.
Once connected, your shortened address appears in the header; click it to copy the full address.
connect-wallet.tip: For the strongest security use a multisig account with hardware signers; the email/password option is the fastest but least secure.

switch-language.title: 切换语言
switch-language.summary: 在 10 种支持的语言间切换界面。
switch-language.intro: The whole interface is translated into ten languages. Your choice is stored in the browser, so the app reopens in the same language next time.
switch-language.steps:
Open the settings (cog) menu in the header.
Expand the Language section.
Pick your language from the list - a check mark shows the active one.
The interface updates instantly without a page reload.
switch-language.tip: The app also tries to match your browser language on first visit before falling back to English.

switch-theme.title: 切换浅色/深色主题
switch-theme.summary: 从页眉切换浅色和深色模式。
switch-theme.intro: Biatec DEX ships a light and a dark theme. The preference is remembered between visits.
switch-theme.steps:
Find the sun/moon button in the header next to the Login or account chip.
Click it to toggle between light and dark mode.
The ambient background and every component re-theme immediately.
switch-theme.tip: Your theme choice is saved locally, so the app reopens in your preferred mode.

trade-screen.title: 交易界面
trade-screen.summary: 查看实时价格、图表、市场深度并为交易对下单。
trade-screen.intro: The trading screen brings together everything you need to trade one asset against another: a price chart, the market depth, recent trades and the order entry panel. The pair is encoded in the URL so any view can be shared.
trade-screen.steps:
Open a pair via Explore then Swap, or navigate to /trade/<network>/<asset>/<currency>.
Use the asset and currency selectors to change either side of the pair.
Watch the price chart and asset info panel for the latest price and volume.
Read the market depth and recent trades to gauge liquidity.
Enter a buy or sell order in the market order panel on the right.
trade-screen.tip: Prices are always shown as Asset/Currency (for example GD/USD); switching the order of the pair inverts the quote.

buy-order.title: 下买单
buy-order.summary: 通过 DEX 聚合器以最优价格买入资产。
buy-order.intro: A buy market order spends your quote currency to acquire the base asset. Orders route through the Folks Router aggregator and the Biatec CLAMM pools to find the best execution.
buy-order.steps:
On the trading screen select the Buy tab in the market order panel.
Enter the quantity of the asset you want to buy.
Review the live quote, including slippage in basis points.
Make sure you are authenticated and opted in to the asset.
Click Buy and approve the transaction in your wallet.
buy-order.tip: If the quote moves beyond your configured slippage, the order is rejected to protect you - raise the slippage in Settings only if you accept a worse price.

sell-order.title: 下卖单
sell-order.summary: 以最优价格将资产卖出换取计价货币。
sell-order.intro: A sell market order converts the base asset back into the quote currency. Like buys, sells route through the aggregator and CLAMM pools for the best price.
sell-order.steps:
On the trading screen select the Sell tab in the market order panel.
Enter the quantity of the asset you want to sell.
Check the quote and the slippage shown before confirming.
Confirm you are authenticated and hold the asset.
Click Sell and approve the transaction in your wallet.
sell-order.tip: Watch the recent trades and market depth first - selling into thin liquidity moves the price more, increasing slippage.

market-depth.title: 查看市场深度
market-depth.summary: 查看交易对的买盘、中间价和卖盘。
market-depth.intro: The market depth panel shows aggregated bids and offers around the mid price, so you can see how much size the market can absorb before the price moves.
market-depth.steps:
Open any trading pair.
Locate the Market depth panel.
Read bids (buy side) on one side and offers (sell side) on the other.
The mid price sits between the best bid and best offer.
Larger rows further from the mid indicate where deeper liquidity sits.
market-depth.tip: Thin depth near the mid means even small orders can move the price - size your trades accordingly.

recent-trades.title: 查看最近成交
recent-trades.summary: 实时跟踪交易对的成交记录流。
recent-trades.intro: The recent trades panel lists the latest executed trades for the selected pair, updating live over a SignalR connection so you always see current market activity.
recent-trades.steps:
Open a trading pair.
Find the Recent trades panel.
Each row shows the time, side (buy/sell), asset amount, currency amount and price.
New trades stream in at the top automatically.
Use the refresh button if you want to reload the history manually.
recent-trades.tip: A steady stream of trades on both sides is a good sign of a healthy, liquid market.

pool-swap.title: 在池中直接兑换
pool-swap.summary: 不经聚合器，直接与单个 Biatec CLAMM 池交易。
pool-swap.intro: The direct AMM pool swap lets you trade against one specific Biatec concentrated-liquidity pool. It is useful when you want to interact with a known pool rather than route through the aggregator.
pool-swap.steps:
Open Manage liquidity for a pair, or use a pool Swap at this pool action.
In the Direct AMM pool swap panel pick the direction (A to B or B to A).
Enter the amount to send; the amount to receive is quoted automatically.
Authenticate and make sure you are opted in to the asset you will receive.
Click Execute swap and approve in your wallet.
pool-swap.tip: Use Max to send your whole balance of the send asset; the quote updates as you type.

select-pair.title: 切换交易对
select-pair.summary: 更改你正在交易的资产或计价货币。
select-pair.intro: Each market is a pair of an asset and a quote currency. You can change either side from the selectors without leaving the trading screen.
select-pair.steps:
On the trading screen find the asset and currency selectors.
Open the asset selector to pick the token you want to trade.
Open the currency selector to pick the quote currency (for example USD or ALGO).
The chart, market depth and trades reload for the new pair.
The URL updates so the new pair can be shared or bookmarked.
select-pair.tip: Prices are shown as Asset/Currency; swapping the two sides inverts the displayed price.

price-chart.title: 查看价格图表
price-chart.summary: 在不同时间周期上跟踪价格走势和成交量。
price-chart.intro: The price chart visualizes how the pair's price and volume have moved over time, helping you judge trend and timing before placing an order.
price-chart.steps:
Open a trading pair.
Locate the price chart at the top of the screen.
Switch timeframes (for example 1D, 7D, 1 Year) to zoom in or out.
Compare current and previous periods shown beneath the chart.
Cross-check the latest price with the asset info panel.
price-chart.tip: Use a longer timeframe to see the trend and a shorter one to time your entry.

asset-info.title: 查看资产信息面板
asset-info.summary: 查看最新价格、成交量和多周期价格数据。
asset-info.intro: The asset info panel summarizes the selected pair: the latest price, trading volume and price across several timeframes, with a refresh control for the freshest data.
asset-info.steps:
Open a trading pair.
Find the Asset info panel.
Read the latest price and the minute, 1D, 7D and yearly figures.
Check the volume for the period.
Use Refresh to reload the latest values.
asset-info.tip: If no price data shows, the pair may have no recent trades - check market depth and recent trades for activity.

share-pair.title: 分享交易对
share-pair.summary: 向任何人发送指向特定交易对和网络的直接链接。
share-pair.intro: The trading screen encodes the network and both assets in the URL, so any view you are looking at can be shared as a plain link that reopens to the exact same pair.
share-pair.steps:
Open the pair you want to share on the trading screen.
Copy the browser URL - it looks like /trade/<network>/<asset>/<currency>.
Send the link to anyone.
When they open it, the app loads the same pair on the same network.
The same pattern works for liquidity links (/liquidity/...).
share-pair.tip: Pair order is normalized automatically (for example ALGO is preferred as the currency), so shared links always open in a consistent orientation.

liquidity-dashboard.title: 流动性提供者仪表板
liquidity-dashboard.summary: 在一个页面查看所有头寸、池价值和持仓。
liquidity-dashboard.intro: The Liquidity Provider Dashboard summarizes every pool you have liquidity in, your holdings and their USD value, so you can manage your positions across all pairs from a single screen.
liquidity-dashboard.steps:
Open LP Dashboard from the top menu.
Review the summary cards: portfolio value, value in pools, holdings and position counts.
Pick a first and second asset to focus on a specific pair.
Use the table actions to add or remove liquidity for any position.
Refresh to reload balances and pool values from the blockchain.
liquidity-dashboard.tip: Opt in to an asset first if you want it to appear as an option when adding new liquidity.

create-pool.title: 创建新池
create-pool.summary: 为任意 Algorand 资产对开设全新的流动性池。
create-pool.intro: If no pool exists yet for the pair you want, you can create one. You pick two Algorand assets, set the initial price and Biatec deploys the concentrated-liquidity pool contracts.
create-pool.steps:
On Explore Assets click Create pool.
Choose a base asset and a quote asset (they must be different).
Search by name, symbol or exact asset ID; on some networks you must enter the exact ASA ID.
Click Continue to move to the add-liquidity step.
Set the initial price and the liquidity shape, then confirm to deploy and seed the pool.
create-pool.tip: Use the swap-assets button if you want to flip which token is the base and which is the quote before continuing.

add-liquidity-focused.title: 添加流动性 - 聚焦形态
add-liquidity-focused.summary: 将大部分流动性集中在当前价格附近以赚取更多手续费。
add-liquidity-focused.intro: The focused shape places the most liquidity in the current price bin and progressively less toward the edges of your range. It maximizes fee income while the price stays near the current level.
add-liquidity-focused.steps:
Open Add liquidity for the pair.
Select the Focused liquidity shape.
Set the low and high price that bound your range.
Choose the LP fee tier and the precision (number of bins).
Enter the deposit amounts, review and confirm to sign.
add-liquidity-focused.tip: Focused works best in calm markets near the current price; if the price leaves your range your liquidity stops earning fees.

add-liquidity-spread.title: 添加流动性 - 分散形态
add-liquidity-spread.summary: 将更多流动性放在宽区间的两端。
add-liquidity-spread.intro: The spread shape is the opposite of focused: it puts the least liquidity at the current price and the most toward the minimum and maximum of your range, covering a broad band of prices.
add-liquidity-spread.steps:
Open Add liquidity for the pair.
Select the Spread shape.
Define a wide low-to-high price range.
Pick the LP fee tier and precision.
Enter deposits, review the bins, and confirm to sign.
add-liquidity-spread.tip: Spread suits volatile pairs where you expect the price to swing across a wide band.

add-liquidity-equal.title: 添加流动性 - 等额分箱
add-liquidity-equal.summary: 在区间的每个价格箱中分配相同的流动性。
add-liquidity-equal.intro: The equal shape spreads identical liquidity across every bin from your minimum to your maximum price, giving uniform coverage of the whole range.
add-liquidity-equal.steps:
Open Add liquidity for the pair.
Select the Equal bin shape.
Set the low and high price of the range.
Choose the LP fee tier and precision.
Enter deposits, review and confirm to sign.
add-liquidity-equal.tip: Equal coverage is a simple, neutral choice when you have no strong view on where the price will trade within your range.

add-liquidity-single.title: 添加流动性 - 单一分箱
add-liquidity-single.summary: 以介于最低与最高价之间的单一头寸提供流动性。
add-liquidity-single.intro: The single-bin shape does not use the tick/bin system. Instead it creates one liquidity position with a defined minimum and maximum price - the classic concentrated-liquidity range.
add-liquidity-single.steps:
Open Add liquidity for the pair.
Select the Single bin shape.
Set the minimum and maximum price for the position.
Use the portion slider to choose how much of your balance to deposit.
Review and confirm to sign.
add-liquidity-single.tip: Deposit amounts are matched to the pool ratio automatically; if they are too small to match, increase both amounts.

add-liquidity-wall.title: 添加流动性 - 价格墙
add-liquidity-wall.summary: 设置一道价格墙，低于则买入、高于则卖出。
add-liquidity-wall.intro: A wall order defines a single price level. When the market is below it, others can buy from you at that level; when the market is above it, others sell to you. You earn whenever the price oscillates across the wall.
add-liquidity-wall.steps:
Open Add liquidity for the pair.
Select the Wall order shape.
Enter the single Price Wall level.
Enter the deposit you want to back the wall with.
Review and confirm to sign.
add-liquidity-wall.tip: A wall is ideal when you want to accumulate or distribute an asset at a fixed price while earning on volatility around it.

remove-liquidity.title: 移除流动性
remove-liquidity.summary: 提取部分或全部头寸并领取已累积的手续费。
remove-liquidity.intro: Removing liquidity returns your deposited tokens plus any fees you earned. You can withdraw a percentage of a position or exit it completely.
remove-liquidity.steps:
Open Manage liquidity or the LP Dashboard and find the pool.
Click Remove liquidity for that position.
Use the percentage slider (or Max) to choose how much to withdraw.
Authenticate if prompted.
Click Remove liquidity and approve the transaction.
remove-liquidity.tip: Fully exiting a position also returns the LP token reserve (MBR) that was locked while you held it.

manage-liquidity.title: 管理流动性
manage-liquidity.summary: 查看池并进行添加、移除或兑换的中枢。
manage-liquidity.intro: The Manage liquidity page is the working area for a pair. It lists existing pools, your positions and exposes the add, remove and direct-swap actions for that pair.
manage-liquidity.steps:
Navigate to /liquidity/<network>/<asset>/<currency> or open it from the DEX menu.
Review the list of pools and their prices, balances and fees.
Use Add liquidity to open a new position.
Use Remove liquidity to withdraw from an existing one.
Use Swap at this pool to trade directly against a pool.
manage-liquidity.tip: Be the first to create a pool for a pair if none exists yet - the page will offer the Create pool flow.

review-before-sign.title: 签名前审核
review-before-sign.summary: 准确了解你的钱包即将批准的内容。
review-before-sign.intro: Before any add-liquidity transaction, Biatec shows a review screen that itemizes every cost and transfer. It is your last chance to verify what your wallet will be asked to sign.
review-before-sign.steps:
Reach the review step at the end of the Add liquidity flow.
Check the deposits, ALGO costs, new-pool funding and estimated network fees.
Read how many times your wallet will prompt you to sign.
Work through the verification checklist (no rekey, no clawback, correct amounts, correct contract).
Click Confirm & sign only when everything matches.
review-before-sign.tip: If your wallet shows a larger ALGO payment, more prompts than stated, or any rekey/close-out, stop and do not sign.

liquidity-shapes.title: 比较流动性形态
liquidity-shapes.summary: 了解聚焦、分散、等额、单一和价格墙形态。
liquidity-shapes.intro: Biatec offers several liquidity shapes that distribute your deposit across price bins in different ways. Choosing the right shape is the single biggest decision when providing liquidity.
liquidity-shapes.steps:
Open Add liquidity for a pair.
Focused: most liquidity at the current price - maximum fees while price stays put.
Spread: most liquidity toward the edges - good for volatile, wide-ranging pairs.
Equal: the same liquidity in every bin - simple, neutral coverage.
Single bin: one classic range; Wall: a single price level that buys low and sells high.
liquidity-shapes.tip: Start with Focused near the current price for a calm pair, or Spread/Equal when you expect wide swings.

lp-fee-tiers.title: 选择 LP 费率档
lp-fee-tiers.summary: 选择你作为流动性提供者赚取的交易手续费。
lp-fee-tiers.intro: Every pool charges a trading fee that goes to its liquidity providers. The fee tier you pick (from 0.01% to 10%) balances how much you earn per trade against how attractive your pool is to traders.
lp-fee-tiers.steps:
Open Add liquidity for the pair.
Find the LP fee selector.
Low fees (0.01%-0.1%) suit stable pairs and attract the most volume.
Standard fees (0.2%-0.3%) balance earnings and attractiveness.
High fees (1%-10%) suit volatile or speculative assets.
lp-fee-tiers.tip: Match the fee to the pair's volatility - too high and traders route elsewhere, too low and you under-earn on risky pairs.

price-range.title: 设置价格区间
price-range.summary: 定义你的流动性生效的最低和最高价格。
price-range.intro: Concentrated liquidity only earns fees while the market price is inside your chosen range. Setting the low and high price defines where your capital works.
price-range.steps:
Open Add liquidity and select a shape that uses a range.
Enter the low price (the bottom of your range).
Enter the high price (the top of your range).
A narrower range concentrates fees but is left more easily by the price.
Review and confirm once the range matches your expectation.
price-range.tip: If the price leaves your range your position stops earning until it returns - widen the range to stay active longer.

precision-bins.title: 设置精度和分箱
precision-bins.summary: 控制你的流动性被分成多少个价格箱。
precision-bins.intro: Precision determines how many discrete bins your range is divided into. More bins give finer control and let your liquidity aggregate cleanly with other providers.
precision-bins.steps:
Open Add liquidity for the pair.
Choose a liquidity shape that uses bins.
Adjust the precision to set the number of bins across your range.
Watch the per-bin preview update as you change precision.
Review and confirm to deploy across the selected bins.
precision-bins.tip: Each new bin can mean a new pool contract and its MBR cost - higher precision is more granular but costs more ALGO to seed.

pool-costs-mbr.title: 了解池成本（MBR）
pool-costs-mbr.summary: 了解你为注资和持有头寸所支付的 ALGO。
pool-costs-mbr.intro: Adding liquidity has real ALGO costs beyond your deposit: each new pool contract requires a minimum balance (MBR), and your LP token reserve is locked while you hold the position.
pool-costs-mbr.steps:
Proceed to the review step of Add liquidity.
Read the new-pool funding line - MBR per new contract across your bins.
Read the LP token reserve that is locked while you hold the position.
Check the estimated network fees and total ALGO out of pocket.
Confirm only if the ALGO total matches your expectation.
pool-costs-mbr.tip: Unused pool funding is returned, and the LP reserve comes back when you fully exit the position.

trader-dashboard.title: 交易者仪表板
trader-dashboard.summary: 跟踪已选入的资产、余额和实时美元估值。
trader-dashboard.intro: The Trader Dashboard is your portfolio view. It lists every asset you are opted in to, your balance, the live price and the USD value of each position.
trader-dashboard.steps:
Open Trader from the top menu.
Review the summary cards: portfolio value, asset count, largest holding and 24h change.
Scan the table for each asset's balance, price and position value.
Use the swap action to trade any holding.
Refresh to reload balances from the blockchain.
trader-dashboard.tip: If an asset you own is missing, opt in to it from here so it appears in your portfolio.

asset-opt-in.title: 选入资产
asset-opt-in.summary: 在接收前，将某个 Algorand 资产注册到你的账户。
asset-opt-in.intro: On Algorand you must opt in to an asset (ASA) before your account can hold it. Opting in submits a zero-amount transfer of that asset to yourself.
asset-opt-in.steps:
Open Trader then Opt in to new asset, or go to /trader/asset-opt-in.
Search by asset name or exact asset ID.
Select the asset from the results.
Make sure you are authenticated.
Click Opt in and approve the zero-amount transaction.
asset-opt-in.tip: Each opt-in locks a small amount of ALGO as minimum balance; it is returned if you later opt out of the asset.

copy-address.title: 复制你的账户地址
copy-address.summary: 将已连接的 Algorand 地址复制到剪贴板。
copy-address.intro: Once connected, your shortened address appears in the header. You can copy the full address with a single click to receive assets or share it.
copy-address.steps:
Connect your wallet so the address chip appears in the header.
Click the address chip (it shows the first and last characters).
The full address is copied to your clipboard and a toast confirms it.
Paste it wherever you need to receive funds.
copy-address.tip: Always double-check the first and last characters of an address before sending funds to it.

disconnect-wallet.title: 断开钱包连接
disconnect-wallet.summary: 退出登录并清除已认证的会话。
disconnect-wallet.intro: Disconnecting logs you out of the app. Because Biatec is self-custodial, this only ends the local session - your assets always remain in your own account.
disconnect-wallet.steps:
Find the Logout button in the header next to your address chip.
Click Logout.
Your session ends and authenticated features lock again.
Reconnect any time with Login.
disconnect-wallet.tip: Disconnect on shared or public computers so the next person cannot sign transactions from your session.

switch-network.title: 切换区块链
switch-network.summary: 在 Mainnet、Testnet 和 Localnet 之间切换。
switch-network.intro: Biatec DEX can run against Algorand Mainnet (live), Testnet (for testing) or a local development network. Switching network reloads assets and clears stale data for the new environment.
switch-network.steps:
Open the settings (cog) menu in the header.
Expand the Environment section.
Choose Algorand (Mainnet), Testnet or Localnet.
The app switches networks and updates the URL's network segment.
Available assets and pools reload for the selected network.
switch-network.tip: Use Testnet to practice the full create-pool, add-liquidity and swap lifecycle with free testnet tokens before going to Mainnet.

settings-blockchain.title: 配置区块链端点
settings-blockchain.summary: 让应用指向自定义的 algod 端点、端口和令牌。
settings-blockchain.intro: The Settings page lets you customize the blockchain connection - useful when running against Localnet or your own node - including the endpoint, port, token and the last-valid-round offset.
settings-blockchain.steps:
Open Settings from the cog menu's Configuration item, or go to /settings.
Find the Blockchain configuration section.
Set the endpoint, port and token for your node.
Adjust the last valid round offset if you need a longer transaction validity window (default 100).
Your settings are saved locally and used for subsequent transactions.
settings-blockchain.tip: The round offset controls how many rounds a transaction stays valid after its first valid round - increase it on slow connections.

settings-swap.title: 配置兑换滑点
settings-swap.summary: 为你的交易设置最大滑点容忍度。
settings-swap.intro: Slippage is the difference between the quoted price and the price you actually get. The swap configuration lets you cap it in basis points, so orders are rejected if the market moves too far.
settings-swap.steps:
Open Settings from the cog menu, or go to /settings.
Find the SWAP configuration section.
Set the Slippage BPS value (1 bp = 0.01%).
Lower values protect your price; higher values make orders more likely to fill in fast markets.
The setting applies to your subsequent buy and sell orders.
settings-swap.tip: Stable pairs can use a tight slippage; volatile or thin markets may need a wider tolerance to execute.

reset-settings.title: 重置配置
reset-settings.summary: 将所有设置恢复为默认值。
reset-settings.intro: If your local configuration gets into a bad state, the danger zone in Settings lets you reset everything to the default values in one click.
reset-settings.steps:
Open Settings from the cog menu, or go to /settings.
Scroll to the Default configuration section.
Find the Danger zone.
Click Reset configuration.
The app restores default blockchain, swap and interface settings.
reset-settings.tip: Resetting only affects locally stored preferences - it never touches your on-chain assets or wallet.

tx-validity.title: 设置交易有效期窗口
tx-validity.summary: 控制你的交易保持有效的时长。
tx-validity.intro: Algorand transactions are valid only for a window of rounds. The last valid round offset sets how many rounds after the first valid round your transactions can still be confirmed.
tx-validity.steps:
Open Settings from the cog menu, or go to /settings.
Find the Blockchain configuration section.
Adjust the Last valid round offset (default 100).
A larger offset gives transactions more time to confirm on slow connections.
The setting is saved locally and applied to new transactions.
tx-validity.tip: Raise the offset if transactions expire before you finish signing; lower it if you want tighter expiry.

localnet-dev.title: 在 Localnet 上开发
localnet-dev.summary: 在本地 Algorand 开发网络上运行 DEX。
localnet-dev.intro: Localnet lets developers run Biatec DEX against a local Algorand node, with a custom endpoint, port and token - ideal for testing contracts and flows without touching public networks.
localnet-dev.steps:
Start your local Algorand network (for example with AlgoKit).
Open the settings (cog) menu and switch the Environment to Localnet.
Open Settings and set the blockchain endpoint, port and token to your node.
Available assets and pools reload for Localnet.
Test the full create-pool, add-liquidity and swap lifecycle locally.
localnet-dev.tip: Localnet is the safest place to experiment - tokens and pools there have no real value.

about.title: 关于 Biatec DEX
about.summary: 了解 Biatec DEX 是什么、其免责声明和上架资产。
about.intro: The About page explains the project: a self-custodial concentrated-liquidity AMM on Algorand, built with support from the Algorand Foundation xGov program. It also lists the assets and important disclaimers.
about.steps:
Open About from the DEX menu, or go to /about.
Read the overview of the CLAMM protocol and DEX aggregator.
Review the disclaimers about self-custody and beta software.
Browse the table of listed assets and search it.
Follow the links to documentation and source code for more detail.
about.tip: Always verify each transaction you sign - the contracts are still under active development and you are responsible for your own accounts.

documentation.title: 打开文档
documentation.summary: 查找更深入的技术文档和源代码。
documentation.intro: Beyond this in-app help, Biatec maintains external documentation and an open-source codebase for deeper technical detail about the protocol and the app.
documentation.steps:
Open the settings (cog) menu and choose Documentation, or visit the About page.
Follow the Documentation link to docs.dex.biatec.io.
Use the About page links for the source code on GitHub.
Refer to the docs for protocol details not covered in these guides.
Return to this help center for step-by-step app walkthroughs.
documentation.tip: Use this help center for how-to walkthroughs and the external docs for protocol and contract specifics.

security-best-practices.title: 安全最佳实践
security-best-practices.summary: 在使用自托管 DEX 时保护你的资金。
security-best-practices.intro: Biatec DEX never holds your assets, which means security is in your hands. A few habits dramatically reduce your risk when signing transactions.
security-best-practices.steps:
Verify every transaction in your wallet before signing - amounts, recipients and no rekey or close-out.
Prefer a multisig account with hardware signers for large balances.
Treat ARC-76 email/password accounts as the fastest but least secure option.
Never share your mnemonic or password, and beware of look-alike scam tokens.
Double-check you are on the official site before connecting your wallet.
security-best-practices.tip: The strongest setup is a multisig with 2FA across multiple hardware devices (for example Ledgers).

help-center.title: 使用帮助中心
help-center.summary: 查找 Biatec DEX 每项功能的指南，并附本地化截图。
help-center.intro: This help center lists every feature of Biatec DEX as a searchable guide. Each guide explains the feature step by step and shows a screenshot in your current language.
help-center.steps:
Open Help from the question-mark icon in the header.
Search or browse the categories to find a topic.
Open a guide to read its description, steps and tip.
Use Open the feature to jump straight to that part of the app.
Follow the related guides at the bottom to keep learning.
help-center.tip: Switch the interface language first if you want the help screenshots and text in another language.

header.dex: 访问交易、流动性管理和一般 DEX 信息
header.environment: 在主网 (实时)、测试网 (测试) 和本地网 (开发) 网络之间切换
header.settings: 访问应用程序设置和偏好

dashboard.portfolioValue: 您的所有资产的总价值，以 USD 计算，包括流动性池中的资产
dashboard.assetsCount: 您在 Algorand 区块链上选择加入的不同资产数量
dashboard.largestHolding: 您的资产持有量最大的，按 USD 价值计算
dashboard.assetSelection: 选择要用于交易的基础货币
dashboard.refresh: 从区块链重新加载您的账户余额和头寸

trading.assetSelector: 选择您想要交易的资产。这将是交易对中的基础货币。
trading.currencySelector: 选择报价货币。价格将显示为资产/货币 (例如 BTC/USD)。
trading.latestPrice: 此资产对的最新交易价格
trading.priceChart: 随时间变化的价格变动和交易量的可视化表示
trading.manageLiquidity: 为此交易对添加或移除流动性

liquidity.shapeFocused: 将大部分流动性放在当前价格周围，随着远离而减少金额
liquidity.shapeSpread: 在广泛的价格范围内均匀分布流动性
liquidity.shapeEqual: 在每个价格仓位放置相同数量的流动性
liquidity.shapeSingle: 在特定价格点创建一个单一的集中头寸
liquidity.shapeWall: 创建价格墙 - 低于墙的买入订单，高于墙的卖出订单
liquidity.lpFee: 您作为流动性提供者赚取的交易费用 (0.01% 到 10%)
liquidity.fee001: 非常低的费用 - 适合波动率低的稳定对
liquidity.fee01: 低费用 - 适合大多数交易对
liquidity.fee02: 标准费用 - 平衡收益和吸引力
liquidity.fee03: 中等费用 - 适合中等波动率的交易对
liquidity.fee1: 高费用 - 适合波动或新的交易对
liquidity.fee2: 非常高费用 - 适合高度投机性资产
liquidity.fee10: 最高费用 - 仅适用于极度波动的资产
liquidity.depositAmount: 您想要添加到流动性池的此资产数量
liquidity.maxButton: 使用您的全部可用余额进行此存款
liquidity.precision: 价格精度影响您的流动性覆盖多少价格水平
liquidity.priceRange: 您的流动性将活跃的价格范围
liquidity.singlePortion: 要使用的最大可能存款的百分比

wallet.connect: 连接您的 Algorand 钱包以开始交易和管理流动性
wallet.disconnect: 断开您的钱包连接并退出
wallet.address: 您的 Algorand 账户地址 - 点击复制
wallet.optIn: 选择加入新资产以使其在您的投资组合中可用
wallet.balance: 您钱包中此资产的当前余额

tables.assetId: Algorand 区块链上此资产的唯一标识符
tables.balance: 您当前拥有的此资产数量
tables.usdValue: 以 USD 评估的您的持有价值
tables.usdPrice: 以 USD 评估的当前市场价格
tables.poolValue: 以 USD 评估的此池中您的流动性价值
tables.poolCount: 此资产所属的流动性池数量
tables.assetTvl: 当此资产是池中的主要资产时，以 USD 计算的总锁定价值 (TVL)
tables.otherAssetTvl: 当此资产是次要资产时，配对资产在池中的 TVL (以 USD 计算)
tables.totalTvl: 涉及此资产的所有池的组合 TVL (以 USD 计算)
tables.currentPrice: 当前市场价格 (以 USD 计算)
tables.volume1d: 24 小时交易量 (以 USD 计算)
tables.fees1d: 过去 24 小时赚取的交易费用 (以 USD 计算)
tables.volume7d: 7 天交易量 (以 USD 计算)
tables.fees7d: 过去 7 天赚取的交易费用 (以 USD 计算)
tables.swapAction: 交易此资产，通过将其与其他资产交换
tables.addLiquidityAction: 为此资产对添加流动性以赚取交易费用
tables.removeLiquidityAction: 移除您的流动性头寸并领取累积费用
